channel.title: Apps on Wayne Cater
channel.description: Recent content in Apps on Wayne Cater

item.title: TypoTheGame
item.description: Released in March 2026, TypoTheGame is a FREE MacOS desktop game that can turn practicing typing skills into fun! Typo runs on minimum macOS version 14.0 (Sonoma) to 26.3.1 (Tahoe). Want to see more details about TypoTheGame? Check out the readme.txt file. View the privacy policy for TypoTheGame! Get it on the Mac App Store℠ OR Download it here

item.title: Road Sign Bingo
item.description: Road Sign Bingo is a game that turns everyday road trips into a scavenger hunt. You get a 5x5 bingo card filled with real road signs. As you spot them out the window, you tap them on your card. Get five in a row and you win! Want to see more details about Road Sign Bingo? Read the readme.txt file. View the privacy policy for Road Sign Bingo. Get it on the

item.title: MemoryMark
item.description: MemoryMark MemoryMark 1.00 was a super simple iOS app I wrote for friend / coworker named Joe back in 2012. The concept was to add a Bible verse to an image and build a wallpaper that Joe could view when using his phone to help memorize the verse. There have been no updates to MemoryMark since 2013 when it was released. Fastforward to 2026, MemoryMark 1.02 is coming! Rewritten in modern Swift with new features, but with the same simple goal - make an image with a Bible verse you select, or input, and output it as a wallpaper!

item.title: Tessera
item.description: Tessera, Latin for tile, is web based version of an iOS / Swift based application I wrote but never released. Click or Tap Start to begin. The tiles are shuffled and your goal is to put them in order. Choose a picture and once you begin the picture is shuffled into chaos! Restore order by sliding the tiles into sequence bringing back the picture with which you started! Tile moves are tracked and the total displayed at the end.

item.title: Solitaire
item.description: Solitaire A clean, fast Klondike Solitaire built to play anywhere — on your desktop, tablet, or phone. No ads, no accounts, no installs required. Just open the page and play. How to play Move all 52 cards to the four foundation piles, one per suit, built up from Ace to King. In the tableau, stack cards in descending rank and alternating color. Flip cards from the stock pile when you’re stuck, and recycle the waste when you run out.
